nodes.context: Italian American Mafia crime family based in Rochester, New York, active from the 1950s to 1993.
Mafia family based in Buffalo, New York, led by Stefano Magaddino.
Mafia family based in Pittsburgh, led by John LaRocca.
One of the Five Families of New York City.

edges.evidence_quote: Prior to this, Rochester was just a crew which answered to the Magaddino's Buffalo crime family.
edges.context: Rochester was originally a crew subordinate to the Buffalo crime family.

edges.evidence_quote: Frank Valenti told Buffalo crime family boss Stefano 'The Undertaker' Magaddino that Rochester would become an independent family.
edges.context: Rochester split from Buffalo to become independent.

edges.evidence_quote: Valenti felt that the Pittsburgh family would back him and the Chirico crew up with muscle.
edges.context: Rochester boss Valenti expected support from the Pittsburgh family.

edges.evidence_quote: his consigliere, Picarreto, had made a secret alliance with members of the Bonanno crime family.
edges.context: A Rochester consigliere secretly allied with the Bonanno family.

edges.evidence_quote: Following his release from prison in July 1996, Thomas Marotta led around half of the remaining former members of the defunct Rochester family in joining the Bonanno family.
edges.context: After the family's dissolution, many members joined the Bonanno family.

edges.evidence_quote: Others, including Rene Piccarreto and Angelo Amico, rejoined the Buffalo family.
edges.context: After the family's dissolution, some members rejoined the Buffalo family.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family, Buffalo crime family, Pittsburgh crime family
edges.context: Infobox lists Buffalo as an ally.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family, Buffalo crime family, Pittsburgh crime family
edges.context: Infobox lists Pittsburgh as an ally.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family, Buffalo crime family, Pittsburgh crime family
edges.context: Infobox lists Bonanno as an ally.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Buffalo crime family, and various other gangs in the Rochester area
edges.context: Infobox lists Buffalo as a rival.
